name: gpumode_fused_leaky_relu
description: Fused bias-add -> leaky_relu -> scale. Derived from AKA torch2hip/gpumode/10190_FusedLeakyReLU module_fn (fused_leaky_relu_fn).

bias.description: Channel bias (>= C, sliced to x's channels).

reference:
import torch.nn.functional as F

def run(x, bias, negative_slope, scale):
    x = x + bias.reshape(1, -1, 1, 1)[:, : x.shape[1]]
    x = F.leaky_relu(x, negative_slope=negative_slope)
    return x * scale
